landing.title: Sadaqah Jariyah
landing.subtitle: On behalf of the late (by Allah's will)
landing.name: Mohamed Elsayed
landing.dua: O Allah, forgive him and have mercy on him, keep him safe and sound, excuse him, honor his reception, and make his entrance wide. Wash him with water, snow, and hail.
